data.title: Create huge-diff-refactor-anomaly.md opus agent with dimension labels (efe7-7f1d T4)
data.description:
## Story
efe7-7f1d — Batch-group dispatch for large-refactor conformance checking

## Testing Mode
GREEN — implements behavior verified by T3 tests

## Depends on
T3 (5275-a50f) — structural tests must be RED first

## What
Create `plugins/dso/agents/huge-diff-refactor-anomaly.md`.

Named outside `code-reviewer-*.md` pattern to bypass Write hook guard and pre-commit gate.

## Frontmatter
```yaml
---
model: opus
name: huge-diff-refactor-anomaly
description: >
  Opus reviewer dispatched during the large-refactor confirmed-refactor branch. Receives
  concatenated diffs of files flagged as anomalous by the haiku conformance sweep.
  Reports pattern_conformance, behavioral_drift, and callsite_completeness findings
  using the standard 5-dimension reviewer schema.
---
```

## Body requirements
1. Full write-reviewer-findings.sh + verify-review-diff.sh procedure (copy from any existing code-reviewer-*.md)
2. Instructions to the agent to use `$DIFF_FILE_PATH` as the primary diff input (not re-run git diff)
3. Dimension mapping instructions:
   - `pattern_conformance` findings → map to `correctness` dimension; prefix description with `[pattern_conformance]`
   - `behavioral_drift` findings → map to `correctness` dimension; prefix description with `[behavioral_drift]`
   - `callsite_completeness` findings → map to `verification` dimension; prefix description with `[callsite_completeness]`
4. REPO_ROOT is provided in the dispatch prompt — use it for all path resolution
5. Passing verdict = no critical findings across all dimensions

## CLAUDE.md Named-agent dispatch table entry
Add this row to the Named-agent dispatch table in CLAUDE.md (alphabetical by agent name, near the `dso:huge-diff-reviewer-*` entries):
```
| `dso:huge-diff-refactor-anomaly` | opus | REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md (confirmed-refactor branch) |
```

## Verification
After creating the file and updating CLAUDE.md:
- `grep 'model: opus' plugins/dso/agents/huge-diff-refactor-anomaly.md` → exits 0
- `grep 'pattern_conformance' plugins/dso/agents/huge-diff-refactor-anomaly.md` → exits 0
- T3 tests `test_refactor_anomaly_agent_exists_and_is_opus` and `test_refactor_anomaly_agent_has_dimension_labels` → PASS
